no external data or inputs are involved.\n\n**Sinks & Flows:**\n- No sinks (e.g., network, file system, system modifications) are present.\n- No data flows or processing of untrusted data occur.\n\n**Anomalies & Analysis:**\n- All reports note the source map comment as standard, not suspicious.\n- No anomalies, obfuscation, or suspicious patterns are identified.\n- The code is simple, minimal, and aligns with common practices.\n\n**Conclusions:**\n- All reports conclude the code is a typical index file with no security concerns, malware, or malicious activity.\n\n---\n\n### Scoring and Justification:\n\n| Issue | Reported Score | Reasonableness | Comments |\n|--------|----------------|------------------|----------|\n| Malware | 0 | Correct | No malicious activity detected;
